problem: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed?
mechanism: Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor
hypothesis: If Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor is applied to be, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 33 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
